Cure.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; vs undead or other creatures harmed by positive energy, delivered by a melee touch attack (harmless positive energy to living creatures); the target may make a Will save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] for half

Empathic Healing.rider: requires the Affliction talent; when restoring body or mind (not soul) you may instead inflict the conditions removed onto an enemy within your restore's range, increasing the restore's cost by [[1]] spell point and requiring a melee or ranged touch attack; on a hit the target must succeed at a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or gain every condition you just restored (except those it is immune to); on a miss or successful save the restored ally is still restored

Sanctify.rider: a special application of restore vs a creature damaged by positive energy, delivered by a melee or ranged touch attack (a ray at range); the target gains [[1d2]] temporary negative levels for [[1]] hour per caster level with no save (the die size increases one step per [[5]] caster levels: [[1d2]], [[1d3]], [[1d4]], [[1d6]], ...); these stack but do not destroy an undead reduced to [[0]] Hit Dice, which instead takes [[4]] points of Constitution drain (or Charisma drain if it has no Constitution score) for the duration; if a negative level lasts longer than [[1]] day the target must succeed at a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] per negative level or it becomes permanent

Taste Of Victory.rider: on a successful hit (attack roll required) against a creature with at least half your character level in Hit Dice, spend [[1]] additional spell point to use a Life sphere ability as a swift action on any willing creature within range; no spell point is required if the hit was a critical hit, knocked the target unconscious, or reduced it to [[0]] or fewer hit points

Blinding Light.rider: when the target glows it is dazzled (-[[1]] on attack rolls and Perception); or spend [[1]] spell point to create bright light that blinds the glowing target and creatures in the area, Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates.

Flare.rider: swift action: expend a glow on the target, ending it; the glowed target takes [[(max(1, floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2)))d4]] untyped damage and every creature within [[5 + 5 * floor(@spheres.cl.total / 5)]] ft is dazzled [[1]] round (Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates the dazzle).

Inner Sun.rider: weapon of light deals this fire damage on a hit; it does not affect invisible or translucent targets (passing harmlessly through them), and reflective/mirror-like creatures have a [[50]]% miss chance against it

Irradiance.rider: when the target glows it is sickened (-[[2]] on attack rolls, weapon damage, saves, and skill/ability checks); spend [[1]] spell point via bright light can worsen this.

Solar Strike.rider: standard action to make a single weapon attack while applying your glow (this casting cannot be reduced below a standard action and does not provoke attacks of opportunity, except as usual for a ranged attack); on a hit the target is also struck by your glow, delivering your chosen [light] effects; with a scatter weapon the blast applies to only [[1]] target chosen at the time of attack

Sunstroke.rider: when the target glows it takes [[(max(1, floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2)))d4]] nonlethal fire each round the glow lasts; a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates that round, and two consecutive saves end it.

Visual Overload.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; while the glow is on the target it must make a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] each round or be staggered for [[1]] round.

Glow.rider: the Light sphere base: a melee OR ranged touch attack (SR applies) causes the target to glow for [[1]] minute per caster level, outlining it (a -[[20]] penalty to Stealth, denies concealment/invisibility from being unseen). Glow talents apply their effect through this glow.

Bound Light.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Disorienting Patterns.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Hypnotic Pattern.rider: spend [[1]] spell point when creating bright light; creatures within the area of bright light that can see must succeed at a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or become fascinated (-[[4]] penalty to Perception checks) while they remain in the light; a new save is allowed each round in the light, and once a creature succeeds it is immune to this effect for the duration.

Precious.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Radiation.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Repelling Light.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Rose-tinted.rider: Range: [[30]] ft cone; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Aiming Scope.rider: Competence bonus to ranged attacks; treats target as one range increment closer for range penalties (an additional increment per [[10]] caster levels).

Guiding Light.rider: If the target sheds bright light instead of a glow, this bonus increases to [[2]], +[[1]] per [[5]] caster levels.

Infravision.rider: Ignores the miss chance for less than total concealment against living creatures.

Disorient.rider: as an expunge, target one creature; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or it takes a -[[2]] penalty on caster level checks (and the further effects listed in the talent) while affected.

Ignition.rider: expunge (ranged touch attack) vs a creature that has a spell pool within your expunge range; for every [[5]] damage dealt the target loses [[1]] spell point and takes a -[[1]] penalty to its magic skill defense for [[1]] round (plus [[1]] additional round at caster level [[10]] and every [[10]] levels thereafter); Special (Transfer talent): a target that cannot store spell points instead takes an equal penalty to its next saving throw against a magical effect for the same duration

Knowledge Drain.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Spellburn.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; opposed magic skill check vs target; on success, target's spell pool is reduced by [[1d3]] spell points (increasing at caster level [[5]] and every four caster levels thereafter, up to [[3]]d[[6]] at caster level [[25]])

Cerebral Strike.rider: a psychic mind-affecting attack; NONLETHAL damage; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Greater Charm (if known) also deals [[1d4]] + [[1]] per [[5]] caster levels ability damage to the target Int, Wis, or Cha (your choice) on a failed save.

Deadly Vision.rider: spend [[2]] spell points; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates (target recognizes the vision as unreal); if the Will save fails, the target must succeed on a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or die from fear (fear effect).

Hostility.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: compels the target to move to and make at least one attack against the nearest creature with a weapon, natural attack, or unarmed strike on its next turn; if no creature can be reached, the target instead deals [[1d8]] + its Strength modifier damage to itself. Greater Charm: the target instead enters a rage for [[1]] round per caster level, gaining a +[[2]] morale bonus to Strength and Constitution and further rage-like bonuses/penalties.

Mental Backdoor.rider: spend [[1]] spell point when a target fails a save against one of your charms, forcing it to attempt a second Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]]; if this second save also fails, for [[1]] minute per caster level the target takes a -[[2]] penalty (increasing by [[1]] per [[10]] caster levels) on Will saving throws against your charms.

Misdirect.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates; on a failed save, roll [[1d8]] as if throwing a splash weapon that missed to determine the direction the target is turned (on a 1 it continues in its intended direction), and the target then moves its intended distance in that new direction instead.

Paralyze.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: target is dazed for [[1]] round. Greater Charm: target is stunned for [[1]] round per caster level (new save each round to end early); this is a full-round action that does not provoke an attack of opportunity. Powerful Charm: as greater, except the target is paralyzed instead of stunned.

Sleep.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: target is staggered for [[1d4]] rounds. Greater Charm: target falls asleep for [[1]] minute per caster level (taking damage automatically wakes it; another creature may wake it as a standard action). Powerful Charm: the sleeping target does not automatically wake from damage or a standard action; instead it must attempt a new Will save to wake up.

Terrifying Mind.rider: spend [[1]] spell point as a free action outside your turn, usable when you succeed a save against a mind-affecting effect and can identify and see its source; the source becomes shaken for [[1]] round per caster level (Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates). At caster level [[10]] or higher, the source is instead frightened for [[1]] round per caster level (shaken for [[1]] round per caster level on a successful save). This is a mind-affecting fear effect.

Utterances.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: for [[1]] minute per caster level, imposes a [[10]]% + [[5]]% per [[5]] caster levels chance of arcane spell failure on any of the target's magic requiring a verbal component (stacks with similar effects, such as the deafened condition), and lets you impose a circumstance bonus or penalty on the target's speech-based checks.

Command.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: forces the target to perform one move, swift, or free action of your choice on its next turn. Greater Charm: you control the target's actions for up to [[1]] round per caster level (a single move or standard action each round; new save each round). Powerful Charm: as greater, without the single-action-per-round limit.

Confusion.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: target is confused for [[1]] round. Greater Charm: target is confused for [[1]] minute per caster level. Powerful Charm: as greater, plus a -[[2]] penalty to caster level and -[[4]] to all mental ability scores.

Fascinate.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: target takes a -[[2]] penalty on Perception checks for [[1]] round per caster level. Greater Charm: target is fascinated for [[1]] round per caster level (breaks immediately if damaged). Powerful Charm: target is fascinated for [[1]] minute per caster level; subsequent saves against hostile threats are made at -[[4]], and damage grants a new save instead of automatically breaking the effect.

Fear.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: target is shaken for [[1]] round per caster level. Greater Charm: target is frightened for [[1]] round per caster level (shaken for [[1]] round per caster level on a successful save). Powerful Charm: target is panicked instead of frightened (shaken for [[1]] round per caster level on a successful save).

Gestures.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: imposes a [[10]]% + [[5]]% per [[5]] caster levels arcane spell failure chance on the target's somatic components and a -[[2]] (-[[1]] per [[5]] caster levels) penalty on any of the target's armor-check-affected skills, for [[1]] minute per caster level. Greater Charm: as lesser, plus you may force the target to drop/pick up a held object or, as a standard action with no attack of opportunity, make a ranged trip attempt using your caster level in place of BAB and your casting ability modifier in place of Strength, and you may prevent the target's gesture/somatic-based magic. Powerful Charm: as greater, plus you may force the target to take an available attack of opportunity against a creature it threatens and move it up to half its speed in a direction you choose.

Suggestion.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: target obeys a simple suggested course of action for up to [[1]] hour per caster level. Greater Charm: as lesser, but the request may be a basic (not merely very simple) request (very simple requests impose a -[[2]] penalty on the save). Powerful Charm: as lesser, but the target obeys any non-fatal course of action not against its nature (basic requests impose a -[[2]] penalty and very simple requests a -[[4]] penalty on the save).

Wrack.rider: Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates. Lesser Charm: target is sickened for [[1]] round per caster level. Greater Charm: target is nauseated for [[1]] round per caster level (sickened for [[1]] round per caster level on a successful save). Powerful Charm: as greater, plus stunned for [[1]] round (sickened for [[1]] round per caster level on a successful save).

Psychic Vengeance.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Charming Strike.rider: you may deliver charms via a melee touch attack, OR make a single weapon attack in conjunction with using a charm; if the attack hits, the target is also affected by the charm. A scatter weapon applies it to a single target.

Destroy Element.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; requires a melee OR ranged touch attack against a target within your geomancing range; on a hit you deconstruct your element on the target, applying a package-dependent effect (e.g. Air — Suffocation: Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or the target is staggered and cannot breathe; other packages impose or deal their own package effect). See the talent for the per-package result.

Nature's Weapon.rider: make one of your Nature package's special attacks (package-dependent — flung debris, an earthen slam, a lashing vine, a jet of water, a gout of flame, etc.), resolving it as the listed attack/save. You may also spend [[1]] spell point (standard action) to grant a target the ability to use one of these attacks for [[1]] round per caster level.

Cyclone.rider: spend [[2]] spell points; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Dragonlung.rider: Range: [[60]] ft line; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Earth.rider: Range: [[10]] ft radius; spend [[1]] spell point; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Earthquake.rider: Range: [[80]] ft radius; spend [[3]] spell points; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Freezing Geyser.rider: Range: ranged, [[30]] ft; spend [[2]] spell points; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Hazardous Terrain.rider: requires a touch attack (using your caster level as the attack bonus) against a creature that steps onto the affected square; on a hit the target takes piercing damage equal to your caster level; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates the accompanying spike/ice effect created by Freeze or Tremor.

Manipulate Nature.rider: Range: [[5]] ft radius; spend [[1]] spell point; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Peace And Love.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Phoenix Resurgence.rider: Range: ranged, [[10]] ft; spend [[3]] spell points

Plant.rider: Range: [[10]] ft radius; spend [[1]] spell point; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Repress Element.rider: Range: [[5]] ft radius; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Temperature.rider: Range: [[120]] ft line; spend [[1]] spell point; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Tsunami.rider: spend [[2]] spell points; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] halves damage; the wave also makes a special combat maneuver check against creatures it strikes.

Volcano.rider: Range: [[40]] ft radius; spend [[2]] spell points; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Water.rider: Range: [[10]] ft radius; spend [[1]] spell point; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Wildfire.rider: spend [[3]] spell points; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Wreath Of Elements.rider: as an immediate action (or a free action by spend [[1]] spell point): Air — make a check vs. the target's CMD; on a success push the target 5 feet directly away from you; Fire — make an attack against a target within your reach dealing your Fire package's damage; other packages instead grant non-offensive benefits (e.g. Earth grants temporary hit points against one attack).

Acceleration.rider: the Bludgeon must move at least [[10]] ft in a straight line before striking (counts as a charge); with Dancing Weapon you may apply charge-related feats and combat talents to the Bludgeon

Dancing Weapon.rider: your Bludgeon counts as a ranged, thrown, or melee weapon under your control (your choice, changeable once per round); apply appropriate feats and combat talents (e.g. Power Attack) to Bludgeon attacks, and a melee Bludgeon has reach and threatens as a creature of its size

Excessive Force.rider: slam the target under your telekinesis into a wall, floor, or object (this ends your telekinesis on it); on a hit the target must make a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or fall prone, and the impacted surface takes the target's size-based Bludgeon damage. Alternatively, in place of an attack roll, both the Bludgeon and the target must make that Reflex save or take the damage and fall prone

Linear Acceleration.rider: spend [[2]] spell points, standard action; hurl a lifted object at a target in line of sight up to [[5]] miles as a ranged touch attack (use your casting modifier in place of Dexterity); on a hit the target takes double the normal Bludgeon damage; on impact everyone within a [[30]] ft radius + [[5]] ft per [[5]] caster levels (including the target) takes this shockwave damage and is dazed for [[1]] round, Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates the daze (the initial target gets no daze save if the touch attack hit)

Sweeping Bludgeons.rider: in place of an attack roll, swing the Bludgeon in a sweeping arc; the target must make a Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or both it and the Bludgeon take the Bludgeon's size-based damage; with Dancing Weapon, effects that add damage to a single attack still apply to that damage, while any penalty to the attack roll (e.g. Power Attack, Lancer impale) instead reduces the save DC by that amount

Telekinetic Crush.rider: each round you maintain concentration on a creature or object held by your telekinesis (no attack roll or save); alternatively, make a Strength check (using your casting modifier plus your largest liftable size modifier) to break a held object

Telekinetic Push.rider: requires [[1]] spell point when used directly on a hostile target (allows no Will save); adds this to the falling damage a target suffers and may be dealt to a target you successfully tripped

Choking Grasp.rider: spend [[2]] spell points; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Hostile Lift.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Kinetic Field.rider: Range: [[10]] ft radius; spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Pantomime Cage.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Tether.rider: Range: ranged, [[30]] ft; spend [[1]] spell point; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Bludgeon.rider: once per turn, while lifting a creature or object with telekinesis you may spend its remaining movement to strike a target within its reach: a RANGED attack (benefits from ranged weapon/combat-talent feats; does not provoke except from the telekinesis casting) dealing the lifted object improvised damage. Making the attack is a standard action.

Age.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; increase or decrease the target age by [[1]] category (an unwilling target gets a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] to negate), applying that age category physical ability-score changes.

Improved Eject.rider: spend [[5]] spell points; touch a target (melee touch attack vs an unwilling creature), Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates; on a failed save the creature is permanently ejected from the space-time continuum into suspended animation (only a freedom spell, Reclamation, or a wish/miracle can reveal or free it)

Lethargy.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; make a melee or ranged touch attack within range; on a hit the target is exhausted (Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates); a target already fatigued or exhausted instead falls asleep (helpless) on a failed save

Slow.rider: the target movement speeds are halved (minimum [[5]] ft) and it takes -[[1]] on attack rolls, AC, and Reflex saves; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates.

Time Clone.rider: vs an unwilling target: requires a melee touch attack (ranged touch attack with Ranged Time), Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates; costs spell points equal to half the target's total Hit Dice (minimum [[1]]); on a hit and failed save you draw an alternate-timeline copy of the target that acts on your turn for [[floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2)]] rounds, sharing the target's statistics, movement, and abilities but vanishing instantly if it takes any damage or fails any saving throw

Broken Time.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Causality.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Eject.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates; on a failed save the target is ejected from time for [[@spheres.cl.total]] round(s) per caster level, vanishing completely (unable to be targeted by any effect and unaware of time passing) and returning to its space (or the nearest open space) when the effect ends

Steal Time.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates; on a failed save the target is dazed for [[1]] round and you immediately gain an additional standard action (a target cannot suffer this effect more than once per round, and you cannot gain more than one standard action per round from this ability)

Time Strike.rider: make a single weapon attack in conjunction with using a single-target alter time effect (standard action, does not provoke unless it is a ranged attack); if the attack hits, the target is also subject to your alter time effect. A scatter weapon applies it to a single target chosen at the time of attack.

Damaging Momentum.rider: on a weapon, natural weapon, or unarmed hit; spend [[2]] points of momentum; adds your casting ability modifier as damage of the same type as the attack; only once per attack

Empower.rider: spend [[1]] spell point as an immediate-action rally; lasts [[1]] round; this +[[4]] morale bonus also applies to CMB; alternatively apply the +[[4]] morale bonus to AC and CMD, to saving throws, or to concentration and spell-penetration checks; decide before the triggering attack or save is rolled

Totem Of Allegiance.rider: spend [[1]] spell point to create the totem; only creatures within it that share the chosen alignment (one you possess) benefit; also grants the same +[[1 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 10)]] circumstance bonus to all saving throws

Totem Of Courage.rider: spend [[1]] spell point to create the totem; you and allies within also gain a +[[1 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 5)]] morale bonus to saves vs fear

Vindictiveness.rider: mandate talent; only against an enemy that just hit your mandate partner; this +[[2]] morale bonus also applies to CMB

Finish.rider: spend [[1]] spell point as an immediate action to rally an ally, allowing them to reroll an attack roll (even to confirm a critical hit) or CMB check; the second result must be used

Gyroscopic Totem.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Strike.rider: spend [[1]] spell point to rally an ally, allowing them to attempt a combat maneuver (not Escape Artist or grapple) against an enemy they threaten without provoking an attack of opportunity; this +[[floor(@spheres.cl.total/5)]] morale bonus applies to their CMB check

Totem Of Doom.rider: spend [[1]] spell point to place the totem; all enemies within become shaken (no save) for as long as they remain in the totem's area

Totem Of Enemies.rider: spend [[1]] spell point to create the totem; enemies within of the chosen alignment (one you do not possess) suffer a -[[1 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 10)]] penalty to attack rolls and saving throws

Totem Of Expulsion.rider: spend [[1]] spell point to create the totem; non-native outsiders within (including allies) are sickened (no save) while inside; they also suffer a penalty equal to your caster level [[@spheres.cl.total]] to damage reduction, energy resistance, and spell resistance

Totem Of Insanity.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Totem Of Screaming Skin.rider: Range: melee touch; spend [[1]] spell point to create the totem; when a weapon or natural weapon attack against an enemy within the totem misses by 5 or less (and is not a natural 1), it becomes a glancing blow dealing damage equal to your caster level [[@spheres.cl.total]]

Totem Of Tenuous Mortality.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Awareness.rider: This attack ignores the target's concealment, displacement, invisibility, and other effects hiding its location (only if your mandate partner damaged it this round).

Demoralizing Momentum.rider: On hit, spend [[1]] momentum as an immediate action to attempt to demoralize the target with Intimidate (shaken). If already shaken, spend [[3]] momentum instead to attempt frightened. If already frightened, spend [[5]] momentum instead to attempt panicked.

Divisive Totem.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Adroitness.rider: mandate talent; only against an enemy that just missed your mandate partner; morale bonus to damage rolls

Totem Of War.rider: while within your Totem of War; you and allies gain this circumstance bonus to all weapon damage rolls

Brutalizing Shunt.rider: when a creature is shunted into an already-occupied space by your teleport or the end of your Create Gap; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or be staggered for [[1]] round per caster level ([[@spheres.cl.total]] rounds)

Splinter.rider: when teleporting a target (usually via Teleport Object or Unwilling Teleport); this damage bypasses all damage reduction, energy resistance, and hardness

Blink.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; as a penalty, the target attacks as if into concealment, suffering a [[min(50, 20 + 5*floor(@spheres.cl.total/3))]]% miss chance on all its attacks, unless it succeeds at a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]]; does not apply to force effects

Create Gap.rider: Range: ranged, [[100]] ft; spend [[1]] spell point; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Dimension Pierce.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; the touched creature or object can target and affect ethereal or incorporeal creatures without the normal 50% miss chance or damage reduction (and a touched ethereal/incorporeal creature can affect the material world as if corporeal); lasts [[1]] hour per caster level ([[@spheres.cl.total]] hours)

Extradimensional Torpor.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Teleport Object.rider: requires Ranged Warp; as a readied action, make an attack roll to catch an incoming projectile and redirect it against another target within range; the original attacker can negate this with a Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]]

Unseeing Teleport.rider: Range: ranged, [[100]] ft; spend [[1]] spell point

Lethal Teleport.rider: requires Unwilling Teleport; unwilling targets may be teleported into locations not in open areas or on solid surfaces, but gain +[[4]] to the save to resist; a creature teleported into the air falls and takes falling damage ([[1d6]] per [[10]] ft) unless it can fly; a creature teleported into an occupied space is shunted out, taking shunt damage as normal

Unwilling Teleport.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; requires a melee touch attack at touch range (or a ranged touch attack with Ranged Warp); Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates and the effect is subject to spell resistance; the target may only be teleported into an open area on a solid surface; +[[4]] to the save if the destination would be directly harmful (e.g. onto a bed of spikes)

Avert.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Looped Space.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Warping Strike.rider: make a single weapon attack in conjunction with a teleport or a (space) talent targeting a creature/object (standard action, no provoke unless ranged); if the attack hits, the target is also struck by the teleport/(space) effect (willing targets only unless you have Unwilling Teleport). A scatter weapon applies it to a single target.

Battering Winds.rider: shroud; the target takes -[[2 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 5)]] on Reflex saves and attack rolls.

Boreal Glare.rider: glare attack (a gaze attack), range [[30]] ft, affecting a single creature you focus on as a swift action, usable only while bearing your mantle in an area of Cold severity [[3]]+; +[[1d6]] cold per Cold severity level above [[3]]; a successful Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] halves the damage; not hindered by precipitation

Contaminated Blows.rider: melee attacks only, while bearing your mantle in an area of Fallout severity [[3]]+; +[[1]] acid per Fallout severity above [[4]]; a creature damaged must make a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or suffer the effects of low radiation, and an already-irradiated creature must instead save or have its radiation level raised one step (max low at severity [[4]], medium at [[5]], high at [[6]], extreme at [[7]])

Crackling Arc.rider: shroud (SR applies; no save to apply); each round at the start of the target turn one random ally within close range takes [[1d6 + @spheres.cl.total]] electricity, Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] halves.

Desiccant.rider: on a natural attack, unarmed strike, or touch attack while bearing your mantle in an area of Aridity severity [[3]]+; nonlethal desiccation damage (no save); the die size increases by one step per Aridity severity above [[3]] (max [[1d12]] at severity [[7]])

Diamond Dust.rider: shroud; at the start of each of the target turns it takes [[1d6 + @spheres.cl.total]] cold, Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] halves.

Dust Cloud.rider: shroud; at the start of each of the target turns it must make a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] or begin coughing, becoming staggered for [[1]] round.

Fata Morgana.rider: shroud; the target's AC is reduced by [[2 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 5)]] (reflected by this attack bonus) and it takes the same penalty on saving throws against illusions.

Heat Stroke.rider: shroud; the target takes -[[2 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 5)]] on Int- and Wis-based checks and skills and [[1d6 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2)]] nonlethal fire each round (half of it becomes lethal at caster level [[10]]).

Karakaze.rider: shroud; the target takes a [[1d6]] penalty to Dexterity that increases by [[1]] at the start of each of its turns (max [[floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2)]]; cannot reduce Dex below [[1]]).

Lightning Rod.rider: with a melee weapon primarily made of metal (or with a metal striking surface) while bearing your mantle in an area of Wind and Precipitation severity [[4]]+; on hit a small lightning bolt strikes the enemy (no save); +[[1d4]] electricity per severity category above storm

Personal Thunderhead.rider: shroud; whenever the target takes a standard or full-round action it takes [[1d6 + @spheres.cl.total]] electricity, Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates.

Razor Ice.rider: unarmed strike or natural attack while bearing your mantle in an area of Cold severity [[4]]+; +[[2]] slashing per category above severity [[4]] (a creature that strikes the mantle-bearer with an unarmed strike or natural weapon also takes [[1]] slashing)

Sirocco.rider: shroud; the target is fatigued (exhausted at caster level [[10]]) and takes [[1d6 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2)]] nonlethal each round; at the start of each turn a Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] halves the damage and staves off the fatigue for that round.

This Sparks Joy.rider: while bearing your mantle in an area of Precipitation and Wind severity [[4]]+ (storm); +[[1]] per category above storm; also grants a +[[2]] morale bonus on Will saving throws

Glare.rider: shroud; the target is dazzled and treats creatures at higher elevation than it as having concealment; other creatures can pinpoint its square even in non-magical darkness.

Illuminating Shaft.rider: shroud; the target takes a Stealth penalty of [[10 + @spheres.cl.total]] and all ranged attacks against it gain +[[1 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 5)]].

Melt Skin.rider: shroud; the target takes -[[2 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 5)]] to AC (reflected by this attack bonus), Fortitude saves, and Charisma-based skill checks.

Cacaphonic Clap.rider: spend [[1]] spell point; each creature within [[10]] ft of the lightning strike: Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates being deafened for [[1]] hour; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates being dazed for [[1]] round; Reflex Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates falling prone

Dehydration Pulse.rider: spend [[2]] spell points, no more than once per [[1d4]] rounds; living creatures (other than you) within [[20]] ft take [[1d6]] damage per caster level and are staggered for [[1d4]] rounds; Fortitude Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] halves the damage and negates the staggered condition; oozes, plants, and creatures with the aquatic or water subtype take double damage

Mirage Sight.rider: vs a target with concealment: roll your miss chance twice and use the better result; +[[2]] per severity step on saves vs illusions

Biting Wind.rider: shroud; the target treats all creatures beyond [[30]] ft as having concealment ([[20]]% miss)

This Does Not Spark Joy.rider: shroud; the target's morale bonuses are suppressed (spend +[[1]] spell point to instead invert them into penalties)

Drench.rider: shroud; each round the target's speed is halved (min [[5]] ft) unless it takes a swift action to dry off (provokes an AoO)

Squamish.rider: shroud; each round a bull rush [[ @spheres.cl.total + @spheres.cam ]] vs the target's CMD from the chosen direction

Wind Tunnel.rider: Ranged weapon attacks ignore wind penalties and gain [[1]] at Wind severity [[2]], +[[1]] per [[2]] severity levels above [[2]].

Interference Cloud.rider: shroud; [[20]]% chance (+[[10]]% per [[5]] levels) the target's charge/spell-point equipment fails when used

Sodden.rider: weapon attacks vs a creature with the fire subtype while bearing your mantle in an area of Precipitation severity [[3]]+; +[[1]] damage per category above severity [[3]]

Weather Strike.rider: make a single weapon attack in conjunction with placing a mantle or shroud (standard action, no provoke unless ranged); if the attack hits, the target is also affected by that mantle/shroud. A scatter weapon applies it to a single target.

Entrapping Circle.rider: spend [[2]] spell points; Will Save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + max(@abilities.int.mod, @abilities.wis.mod, @abilities.cha.mod) ]] negates

Draconic Creature.rider: companion gains a breath weapon usable once per [[1d4]] rounds: a [[30]]-ft cone or [[60]]-ft line (chosen when gained) dealing [[1d8]] acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage (chosen when gained) per [[2]] Hit Dice (minimum [[1d8]]); Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @abilities.con.mod ]] halves

Elemental Creature.rider: each of the companion's natural attacks deals an extra [[1d3]] acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage (chosen when gained); this die increases one step per [[5]] Hit Dice

Explosive Companion.rider: when the companion is reduced to [[0]] hit points or fewer it explodes, dealing [[1d6]] acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage (chosen when gained) per Hit Die to all creatures within [[5]] ft + [[5]] ft per [[5]] Hit Dice; Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@spheres.cl.total / 2) + @spheres.cam ]] halves

Infectious Creature.rider: when a creature takes damage from the companion's manufactured or natural weapon attack it must make a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @abilities.con.mod ]] or immediately contract the chosen disease (no onset period); whether it saves or fails it is immune to this ability from the companion for [[24]] hours

Ooze Companion.rider: (taken twice) as a standard action the companion moves up to its speed and engulfs any creature smaller than itself in its path; a target that forgoes its attack of opportunity may make a Reflex save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @abilities.str.mod ]] to avoid (on a success it is pushed aside), otherwise it is engulfed: pinned, in danger of suffocating, and taking [[1d4]] slam damage each round (escape as a pin)

Ravenous Creature.rider: companion gains swallow whole: a successful grapple check at the start of its turn (standard action) swallows a grappled creature up to one size smaller (dealing bite damage if it has a bite); each round swallowed the target is pinned, may suffocate, and takes [[1d6]] bludgeoning + [[1d6]] acid per [[3]] Hit Dice; it can cut free with a light slashing or piercing weapon after dealing [[1/10]] the companion's total hit points

Roguish Creature.rider: the companion deals an extra [[1d6]] precision (sneak attack) damage against foes that are flat-footed or denied their Dexterity bonus, increasing to [[2d6]] at [[7]] Hit Dice and [[3d6]] at [[14]] Hit Dice

Sanguine Creature.rider: (Bleed option) one chosen natural attack inflicts [[1d2]] bleed on a hit (die increases one step per [[4]] Hit Dice: [[1d3]], [[1d4]], [[1d6]], [[1d8]]), stopped by a [[DC 15]] Heal check or any magical healing; alternatively (Blood Drain) [[1]] Constitution damage at end of turn while grappling (scaling to [[1d2]] at [[5]] Hit Dice), or (Thirst) gain temporary hit points equal to the grappled creature's Hit Dice on a blood drain

Shocking Creature.rider: standard-action melee touch attack (provokes no attack of opportunity) delivering the electricity damage; if a creature grapples the companion it may instead deal it as an immediate action with no attack roll but a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @abilities.con.mod ]] for half; while in water it becomes a [[10]]-ft-radius burst (Fortitude save for half; creatures from [[10]] to [[30]] ft take half, then Fortitude save for half again); cannot be used again for [[1d4]] rounds

Stinking Companion.rider: (Nauseating Spray) standard action, [[15]]-ft cone: each creature makes a Fortitude save [[ 10 + floor(@attributes.bab.total / 2) + @abilities.con.mod ]] or is sickened for [[1d6]] rounds (poison); or (Stench) any creature other than you adjacent to the companion must make the same Fortitude save or be sickened until [[1d6]] rounds after it is no longer adjacent (a success grants immunity for [[24]] hours; poison)

Vengeance.rider: when an enemy you can see successfully hits a creature bearing one of your aegises; as an immediate action, sacrifice an aegis on that creature to make this weapon or natural weapon attack against the attacker
